ModuleTitle.helper: Administrator-facing title for the module. This helps OpenContent sync with DNN module settings.

ModuleAnchor.helper: Optional. Used for #anchor links on the page. Use only letters, numbers, and hyphens.

Heading.helper: Required. Main heading shown in the center of the section.

HeadingCssClass.helper: Optional. Choose a text color or theme heading class for the heading.

DescriptionText.helper: Required. Short supporting text shown under the heading.
DescriptionText.placeholder: Whether you are an individual seeking peace or a team needing renewal, the forest is waiting.

PrimaryCtaButtonText.helper: Required. Text shown on the main button.

PrimaryCtaButtonUrl.helper: Required. Where the main button should go.

SecondaryCtaButtonText.helper: Optional. If both the text and URL are filled in, the second button will be shown.

SecondaryCtaButtonUrl.helper: Optional. Fill this in along with the second button text to show the second CTA.
